name: Business Signal Workshop
positioning: Business clarity, signal detection, and practical decision filters for people building serious work.
audience: Founders, operators, consultants, and professionals who need clearer business signals.
voice: Strategic, signal-focused, direct, diagnostic, insightful, practical.
visualStyle: Authority-building frameworks, diagnostic checklists, restrained business graphics, clear contrast.
postingFrequency: 4 authority posts weekly, 2 discussion prompts, 1 direct offer post during launch windows.
ctaOptions: Comment with the signal you are trying to interpret.
Use this as a decision filter this week.
imageStyleRules: Favor matrices, checklists, decision trees, and sparse quote cards.
Never use fake charts as evidence.
Make the insight obvious in two seconds.
promptGuardrails: Use one sharp observation and one practical takeaway.
sampleHooks: Most businesses do not have a growth problem. They have a signal problem.
Noise demands action. Signal demands interpretation.
Before you add a tactic, name the assumption it is supposed to fix.
